extraction.one_line_summary: VAN AVERMAET won from a 5-man sprint after the decisive 3-rider break formed at 15km (Carrefour de l'Arbre), absorbing two chasers before the velodrome.
tactical_patterns: Record fast pace (143km in 3h) eliminated pure diesel riders before cobbles selections, favoring puncheurs over endurance specialists.
Decisive move at Carrefour de l'Arbre (15km out) not earlier cobbles; STEBAR's team driving neutralized attacks before critical juncture.
Two chasers (MOSCON, STUYVEN) bridged to lead trio entering velodrome, proving late positioning trumps early break energy expenditure.

rider_signals.VAN AVERMAET Greg: positive: won from reduced sprint after earlier crash at Wallers, showing superior recovery capacity under race-record pace
rider_signals.STEBAR Zdenek: negative: led out the velodrome sprint but lacked finishing power, tactical error surrendering wheel before line
rider_signals.BOONEN Tom: negative: unable to follow decisive move at 15km despite being with leaders at 40km, age-related decline in final hour
rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: neutral: present in lead group at Mons-en-Pévèle (84km out) but disappeared before Carrefour selection, endurance limit exposed
rider_signals.MOSCON Gianni: positive: bridged from chase group to leaders in final kilometers, demonstrating superior late-race speed reserve
